name: @kouhin/redaxios
description: The Axios API, as a tiny (~4KB) Fetch wrapper. Rewritten in TypeScript with axios-compatible error handling.

scripts.build: bun run build:esm && bun run build:cjs && tsc
scripts.build:esm: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/redaxios.js --format esm --target browser
scripts.build:cjs: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/redaxios.cjs --format cjs --target browser
scripts.release: bun run build && bun test && git commit -am "$npm_package_version" && git tag $npm_package_version && git push && git push --tags && npm publish --access public

author: kouhin
